title: lastrea recumbens
intro: Lastrea recumbens, also known as the creeping fern or the creeping maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea recumbens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote healthy digestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and treat specific health conditions.
